name: Ratatouille
recipeIngredient: 4 large red ripe tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the eggplant slices, zucchini slices, and green pepper slices in a large oven-safe bowl.
2. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon of salt and pour 1 quart of boiling water over the vegetables. Let stand for 10 minutes, drain, and pat dry.
3. In a large skillet, cook the onions and garlic cloves until softened.
4. Spread the onion mixture on the bottom of an oiled shallow 2-quart baking dish.
5. Arrange half the vegetable mixture on top of the onion mixture and spread it with half the tomato slices. Sprinkle the tomatoes with 1/2 teaspoon basil, salt, pepper to taste, and 2 tablespoons Parmesan cheese.
6. Arrange the remaining vegetables and tomatoes in layers in the baking dish and season them with 1/2 teaspoon basil and salt and pepper to taste.
7. Sprinkle with the remaining Parmesan cheese and bread crumbs.
8. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes.
